title: Elon Musk Becomes World’s First Trillionaire as SpaceX Stock Begins Trading

title: Judge Declines to Halt UFC Fight at the White House on Trump’s Birthday

summary: Top officials and some lawmakers say letting a powerful spying authority expire on Saturday will leave the United States dangerously blind. But surveillance can still continue.

title: David Hockney, Who Restored the Human Form to Art, Dies at 88
summary: His colorful figurative paintings were both conservative and iconoclastic, defying the dominant abstract schools of the mid-20th century.

summary: Whether in Los Angeles, in his native England or traveling the world, the artist always reinvented the world he saw, with psychological insight.

summary: The painter David Hockney’s clothes roared with mirth and maximalism.

title: Scientists Race to Test Treatments as Ebola Outbreak Widens
summary: Trials are beginning on several drugs that have shown promise in preliminary studies against the virus that is causing the current outbreak.

title: Inside Cesar Chavez’s Labor Union, Women Faced a Culture of Sexual Abuse
summary: Many of the women who helped lead the fight for Latino civil rights say they were quietly waging their own battles with harassment, misogyny and sexual assault inside the powerful United Farm Workers union.

title: After Senate Loss, Cornyn Predicts ‘Miserable’ Final Two Years for Trump

title: Can Democrats Overcome G.O.P. Gerrymandering?
